title: oxytropis besseyi var. obnapiformis
intro: Oxytropis besseyi var. obnapiformis, also known as Bessey's globular milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oxytropis besseyi var. obnapiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing its leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
